Inclusion & Diversity
Travel makes our world bigger

Inspired by the travelers we serve

Connecting the world starts from within. When our teams reflect the rich diversity of travelers, everyone thrives. Building a truly inclusive space is how we create better experiences and grow together.

Inclusion at the heart of travel

Inclusion and diversity are woven into the fabric of our culture. We believe it drives innovation, strengthens relationships with travelers, and creates a workplace where everyone feels valued and can contribute long-term.

Hear from the diverse voices on our team

“Every day at Expedia Group, we’re building more than travel. We’re building a culture of belonging where people feel seen, supported, and psychologically safe enough to lead authentically.”

Guishard R.

Inclusion & Diversity Senior Manager, Global IBGs

“I focus on architecting cultures where leadership accountability, diverse perspectives, and equitable systems converge — because sustainable innovation depends on who has voice, access, and opportunity.”

Francisco G.  

Global Culture, Experience, Inclusion and Diversity Manager

“I’m genuinely grateful to be on the I&D team, focused on operations that help us embed diversity into everything we do — making our work smoother while also bringing our diverse perspectives and ‘flavor’ to it.”

Shayla J.

Talent Analyst & Project Manager

Inclusion Business Groups

Our company-sponsored, self-organized Inclusion Business Groups partner with the Inclusion & Diversity Team to connect employees, cultivate community belonging, and invite everyone to be an ally.

Asian Community at Expedia Group (ACE)
Ability Inclusion Movement (AIM)
Black Expedia Allied Movement (BEAM)
Indigenous Diversity, Expedians & Allies (IDEA)
Latinx at Expedia and Allies for Development (LEAD)
Expedia Group LGBTQIA+ & Allies (PRIDE)
Veterans at Expedia Group & Their Supporters (VETS)
Women at Expedia Group Learning & Leading (WELL)

Join us in shaping a more inclusive future of travel

Become part of a community of travelers and technologists that connect time zones, hemispheres, cultures, and languages.
